hero.description: Real-time earthquake monitoring for India powered by National Centre for Seismology data. Instant SMS alerts, offline safety guides, and state-wise coverage.

alerts.title: Get Instant Earthquake Alerts
alerts.description: Receive instant notifications via Email and WhatsApp when earthquakes occur in your region.
alerts.freeNote: Free forever. Unsubscribe anytime. No spam, ever.
alerts.successDesc: You'll be notified when earthquakes happen in your region.
alerts.instantDeliveryDesc: Receive alerts within seconds of earthquake detection
alerts.locationSpecificDesc: Only get alerts relevant to your state
alerts.multiChannelDesc: Get notified via Email, WhatsApp, or both
alerts.poweredByNCSDesc: Data from National Centre for Seismology, India

safety.title: Earthquake Safety Guide
safety.subtitle: Essential safety information for before, during, and after an earthquake. Save this page for offline access during emergencies.
safety.saveOfflineDesc: Add this page to your home screen or bookmark it for quick access during emergencies when internet may not be available.
safety.kit_tip_1: Stock at least 3 days of water (4 liters per person per day)
safety.kit_tip_2: Non-perishable food items and manual can opener
safety.kit_tip_3: First aid kit with essential medicines
safety.kit_tip_8: Wrench or pliers to turn off utilities
safety.plan_tip_1: Identify safe spots in each room (under sturdy tables, against interior walls)
safety.plan_tip_2: Practice DROP, COVER, and HOLD ON drills
safety.plan_tip_3: Establish an out-of-state contact for family check-ins
safety.plan_tip_4: Know how to shut off gas, electricity, and water
safety.plan_tip_5: Plan evacuation routes from home and work
safety.plan_tip_7: Ensure all family members know meeting points
safety.home_tip_2: Secure water heaters and gas appliances
safety.home_tip_4: Move heavy objects to lower shelves
safety.home_tip_6: Know where main gas valve is located
safety.indoor_tip_1: DROP to your hands and knees immediately
safety.indoor_tip_2: Take COVER under a sturdy desk or table
safety.indoor_tip_4: Stay away from windows, outside walls, and heavy objects
safety.indoor_tip_5: Do NOT run outside during shaking
safety.indoor_tip_6: If in bed, stay there and cover your head with a pillow
safety.indoor_tip_7: If in a wheelchair, lock wheels and protect your head
safety.outdoor_tip_1: Move away from buildings, trees, streetlights, and utility wires
safety.outdoor_tip_2: Drop to the ground in an open area
safety.outdoor_tip_3: Protect your head and neck with your arms
safety.outdoor_tip_4: Stay in open area until shaking stops
safety.outdoor_tip_6: After shaking stops, move carefully and watch for hazards
safety.vehicle_tip_1: Pull over to a clear area safely
safety.vehicle_tip_2: Avoid stopping near buildings, overpasses, or utility wires
safety.vehicle_tip_3: Stay inside the vehicle with seatbelt fastened
safety.vehicle_tip_5: Turn on the radio for emergency information
safety.vehicle_tip_6: After shaking, proceed cautiously and avoid damaged roads
safety.immediate_tip_1: Check yourself and others for injuries
safety.immediate_tip_2: Expect aftershocks - be ready to DROP, COVER, HOLD ON
safety.immediate_tip_3: Check for gas leaks - if you smell gas, leave immediately
safety.immediate_tip_4: Check for electrical damage - if you see sparks, turn off main breaker
safety.immediate_tip_6: Use flashlights, not candles or matches
safety.comm_tip_1: Listen to emergency broadcasts on radio
safety.comm_tip_2: Use text messages instead of calls to reduce network load
safety.comm_tip_3: Check in with family members at designated contact
safety.comm_tip_5: Do not spread rumors - verify information before sharing
safety.comm_tip_6: Register on 'I Am Alive' registry if available
safety.resource_tip_7: Disaster Management App: Download NDMA app

prediction.title: Advanced Earthquake
prediction.description: Our machine learning algorithms analyze thousands of seismic data points, historical patterns, and geological factors to predict earthquake probability with unprecedented accuracy.

footer.brandDesc: Advanced earthquake prediction and real-time seismic monitoring powered by cutting-edge AI technology. Keeping communities safe worldwide.
footer.dataSourced: Data sourced from NCS and Indian seismic networks
